output.sql: SELECT h.ID FROM highschooler AS h WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM friend AS f WHERE f.student_id = h.ID) LIMIT 100
output.raw_sql:
SELECT h.ID
FROM highschooler AS h
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM friend AS f
  WHERE f.student_id = h.ID
)
LIMIT 100
